reasoning: Strong CBC padding oracle implementation with clever defenses (20-bit PoW, timestamp-precision oracle signal, constant-time delay). However, critical flag isolation failure: init_crypto.py is left in /app/ readable by ctfuser and contains the hardcoded flag as a fallback string — a contestant can simply read the source file to get the flag, bypassing the entire cryptographic challenge. The intended solution description also mismatches the code (mentions ERR_DSAS_001/002 error codes but the actual oracle uses microsecond vs millisecond timestamp precision).
